complex/test_bound_conversion_existence..raw_tail:
assert 'WHERE
    "quizzical"."date_converted" = "cheerful"."latest_date" and True
GROUP BY
    1,
    2)' in '
WITH 
quizzical as (SELECT
    "ds_info"."id" as "id",
    cast("ds_info"."date_string" as date) as "date_conver..."."date_converted" as "date_converted",
    count("wakeful"."id") as "id_count"
FROM
    "wakeful"
GROUP BY
    1'

[RENDERING] Compiled query: 
WITH 
quizzical as (
SELECT
    "carrier"."carrier_code" as "carrier_code",
    "carrier"."carrier_name" as "carrier_name"
FROM
    (
select 'AA' as carrier_code, 'American' as carrier_name
union all select 'UA', 'United'
) as "carrier"),
highfalutin as (
SELECT
    "flight"."carrier_code" as "carrier_code",
    "flight"."id" as "id"
FROM
    (
select 1 as id, 'AA' as carrier_code
union all select 2, 'AA'
union all select 3, 'UA'
) as "flight"),
wakeful as (
SELECT
    "highfalutin"."id" as "id",
    "quizzical"."carrier_name" as "carrier_name"
FROM
    "highfalutin"
    INNER JOIN "quizzical" on "highfalutin"."carrier_code" = "quizzical"."carrier_code"),
cooperative as (
SELECT
    count("wakeful"."carrier_name") as "named_carriers"
FROM
    "wakeful"),
cheerful as (
SELECT
    count("wakeful"."id") as "flight_count"
FROM
    "wakeful")
SELECT
    coalesce("cheerful"."flight_count",0) as "flight_count",
    coalesce("cooperative"."named_carriers",0) as "named_carriers"
FROM
    "cheerful"
    FULL JOIN "cooperative" on 1=1

INFO     trilogy:base.py:2310 [RENDERING] Compiled query: 
WITH 
quizzical as (
SELECT
    "carrier"."carrier_code" as "carrier_code",
    "carrier"."carrier_name" as "carrier_name"
FROM
    (
select 'AA' as carrier_code, 'American' as carrier_name
union all select 'UA', 'United'
) as "carrier"),
highfalutin as (
SELECT
    "flight"."carrier_code" as "carrier_code",
    "flight"."id" as "id"
FROM
    (
select 1 as id, 'AA' as carrier_code
union all select 2, 'AA'
union all select 3, 'UA'
) as "flight"),
wakeful as (
SELECT
    "highfalutin"."id" as "id",
    "quizzical"."carrier_name" as "carrier_name"
FROM
    "highfalutin"
    INNER JOIN "quizzical" on "highfalutin"."carrier_code" = "quizzical"."carrier_code"),
cooperative as (
SELECT
    count("wakeful"."carrier_name") as "named_carriers"
FROM
    "wakeful"),
cheerful as (
SELECT
    count("wakeful"."id") as "flight_count"
FROM
    "wakeful")
SELECT
    coalesce("cheerful"."flight_count",0) as "flight_count",
    coalesce("cooperative"."named_carriers",0) as "named_carriers"
FROM
    "cheerful"
    FULL JOIN "cooperative" on 1=1

  1. collapse_single_parent
  2. merge_irrelevant_group_by
  3. inline_datasource
  4. join_hoist after=['inline_datasource'] (runs after datasource inlining so joins that target folded datasources stay folded when hoisted)
  5. merge_irrelevant_group_by.after_join_hoist after=['join_hoist'] refires_after=['join_hoist'] (uses joins and predicates stripped by join hoist)
  6. predicate_pushdown.initial after=['inline_datasource', 'join_hoist'] (runs after datasource inlining and join hoist so filters on folded raw sources stay local instead of requiring BuildDatasource pushdown)
  7. upgrade_join_on_guards.base_join_only after=['predicate_pushdown.initial'] (makes guarded dim BaseJoins INNER before union dim pushdown tries to match them)
  8. union_dim_pushdown after=['predicate_pushdown.initial', 'upgrade_join_on_guards.base_join_only'] (matches settled consumer predicates and INNER dim joins)
  9. predicate_pushdown.after_union_dim after=['union_dim_pushdown'] refires_after=['union_dim_pushdown'] (only refires when union_dim_pushdown adds branch-visible dim concepts)
  10. predicate_pushdown.remove after=['predicate_pushdown.after_union_dim']
  11. merge_irrelevant_group_by.after_predicate_remove after=['predicate_pushdown.remove'] refires_after=['predicate_pushdown.remove'] (uses redundant predicates removed from grouped children)
  12. upgrade_join_on_guards.final after=['predicate_pushdown.remove'] (uses guards moved onto joining CTEs by predicate pushdown)
  13. predicate_pushdown.after_final_upgrade after=['upgrade_join_on_guards.final'] refires_after=['upgrade_join_on_guards.final'] (HAVING-into-group push is blocked while a consumer outer-joins the group (nullable parent); rerun once the final pass has upgraded CTE-to-CTE outer joins to INNER so the relocation can fire)
  14. upgrade_outer_key_set_equivalence after=['upgrade_join_on_guards.final'] (needs upstream filters in their final position so the accumulated-filter signatures on each side are stable)
  15. simplify_null_safe_joins after=['upgrade_join_on_guards.final', 'upgrade_outer_key_set_equivalence'] (join types and CTE nullability are settled, so redundant null-safe join keys can be downgraded to =)
  16. hide_unused_concepts

WITH 
quizzical as (
SELECT
    "customers"."customer_id" as "customer_id"
FROM
    (
select
    2 as customer_id, 'Sarah' as name
union all
select
    3 as customer_id, 'Enrique' as name
) as "customers"
WHERE
    "customers"."name" = 'Sarah'
),
highfalutin as (
SELECT
    "orders"."customer_id" as "customer_id",
    "orders"."price" as "price"
FROM
    (
select
    1 as order_id,
    2 as customer_id,
    3.14 as price
union all
select
    2 as order_id,
    3 as customer_id,
    4.56 as price
union all
select
    3 as order_id,
    2 as customer_id,
    7.89 as price
) as "orders")
SELECT
    "quizzical"."customer_id" as "customer_id",
    sum("highfalutin"."price") as "total_customer_revenue"
FROM
    "highfalutin"
    INNER JOIN "quizzical" on "highfalutin"."customer_id" = "quizzical"."customer_id"
GROUP BY
    1

[RENDERING] Compiled query: 
WITH 
cheerful as (
SELECT
    "rich_info_rich_info"."Net Worth 1918 Dollars" as "rich_info_net_worth_1918_dollars",
    STRING_SPLIT( "rich_info_rich_info"."Name" , ' ' )[-1] as "rich_info_last_name"
FROM
    "rich_info" as "rich_info_rich_info"
WHERE
    "rich_info_rich_info"."Net Worth 1918 Dollars" is not null

GROUP BY
    1,
    2),
quizzical as (
SELECT
    "dim_passenger"."id" as "passenger_id",
    "dim_passenger"."last_name" as "passenger_last_name"
FROM
    "dim_passenger"
WHERE
    "dim_passenger"."last_name" is not null
),
questionable as (
SELECT
    "cheerful"."rich_info_net_worth_1918_dollars" as "rich_info_net_worth_1918_dollars",
    "dim_passenger"."id" as "passenger_id"
FROM
    "dim_passenger"
    INNER JOIN "cheerful" on "dim_passenger"."last_name" = "cheerful"."rich_info_last_name"
WHERE
    "dim_passenger"."last_name" is not null and "cheerful"."rich_info_net_worth_1918_dollars" is not null
)
SELECT
    "quizzical"."passenger_last_name" as "passenger_last_name",
    "questionable"."rich_info_net_worth_1918_dollars" as "rich_info_net_worth_1918_dollars"
FROM
    "questionable"
    INNER JOIN "quizzical" on "questionable"."passenger_id" = "quizzical"."passenger_id"
WHERE
    "questionable"."rich_info_net_worth_1918_dollars" is not null

ORDER BY 
    "quizzical"."passenger_last_name" desc

INFO     trilogy:base.py:2310 [RENDERING] Compiled query: 
WITH 
cheerful as (
SELECT
    "rich_info_rich_info"."Net Worth 1918 Dollars" as "rich_info_net_worth_1918_dollars",
    STRING_SPLIT( "rich_info_rich_info"."Name" , ' ' )[-1] as "rich_info_last_name"
FROM
    "rich_info" as "rich_info_rich_info"
WHERE
    "rich_info_rich_info"."Net Worth 1918 Dollars" is not null

GROUP BY
    1,
    2),
quizzical as (
SELECT
    "dim_passenger"."id" as "passenger_id",
    "dim_passenger"."last_name" as "passenger_last_name"
FROM
    "dim_passenger"
WHERE
    "dim_passenger"."last_name" is not null
),
questionable as (
SELECT
    "cheerful"."rich_info_net_worth_1918_dollars" as "rich_info_net_worth_1918_dollars",
    "dim_passenger"."id" as "passenger_id"
FROM
    "dim_passenger"
    INNER JOIN "cheerful" on "dim_passenger"."last_name" = "cheerful"."rich_info_last_name"
WHERE
    "dim_passenger"."last_name" is not null and "cheerful"."rich_info_net_worth_1918_dollars" is not null
)
SELECT
    "quizzical"."passenger_last_name" as "passenger_last_name",
    "questionable"."rich_info_net_worth_1918_dollars" as "rich_info_net_worth_1918_dollars"
FROM
    "questionable"
    INNER JOIN "quizzical" on "questionable"."passenger_id" = "quizzical"."passenger_id"
WHERE
    "questionable"."rich_info_net_worth_1918_dollars" is not null

ORDER BY 
    "quizzical"."passenger_last_name" desc

WITH 
highfalutin as (
SELECT
    "items"."category" as "category",
    avg("items"."price") as "_virt_agg_avg_4251992913115478"
FROM
    "items_tbl" as "items"
GROUP BY
    1),
cheerful as (
SELECT
    "items"."category" as "category",
    "sales"."id" as "sale_id",
    "sales"."item_price" as "sale_item_price"
FROM
    "items_tbl" as "items"
    INNER JOIN "sales_tbl" as "sales" on "items"."id" = "sales"."item_id"
WHERE
    "sales"."year" = 2023

GROUP BY
    1,
    2,
    3),
thoughtful as (
SELECT
    "cheerful"."sale_id" as "sale_id"
FROM
    "cheerful"
    INNER JOIN "highfalutin" on "cheerful"."category" = "highfalutin"."category"
WHERE
    "cheerful"."sale_item_price" > "highfalutin"."_virt_agg_avg_4251992913115478"

GROUP BY
    1)
SELECT
    count("thoughtful"."sale_id") as "sale_count"
FROM
    "thoughtful"

WITH 
highfalutin as (
SELECT
    "items"."category" as "category",
    avg("items"."price") as "_virt_agg_avg_4251992913115478"
FROM
    "items_tbl" as "items"
GROUP BY
    1),
cheerful as (
SELECT
    "items"."category" as "category",
    "sales"."id" as "sale_id",
    "sales"."item_price" as "sale_item_price"
FROM
    "items_tbl" as "items"
    INNER JOIN "sales_tbl" as "sales" on "items"."id" = "sales"."item_id"
WHERE
    "sales"."year" = 2023

GROUP BY
    1,
    2,
    3),
thoughtful as (
SELECT
    "cheerful"."sale_id" as "sale_id"
FROM
    "cheerful"
    INNER JOIN "highfalutin" on "cheerful"."category" = "highfalutin"."category"
WHERE
    "cheerful"."sale_item_price" > "highfalutin"."_virt_agg_avg_4251992913115478"

GROUP BY
    1)
SELECT
    count("thoughtful"."sale_id") as "sale_count"
FROM
    "thoughtful"

WITH 
quizzical as (
SELECT
    "items"."category" as "category",
    avg("items"."price") as "_virt_agg_avg_4251992913115478"
FROM
    "items_tbl" as "items"
GROUP BY
    1),
cheerful as (
SELECT
    "staged_sales"."sale_id" as "sale_id"
FROM
    "quizzical"
    INNER JOIN "staged_sales_tbl" as "staged_sales" on "quizzical"."category" = "staged_sales"."category"
WHERE
    "staged_sales"."sale_item_price" > "quizzical"."_virt_agg_avg_4251992913115478"

GROUP BY
    1)
SELECT
    count("cheerful"."sale_id") as "sale_count"
FROM
    "cheerful"

INFO     trilogy:base.py:2310 [RENDERING] Compiled query: 
WITH 
highfalutin as (
SELECT
    "items"."category" as "category",
    avg("items"."price") as "_virt_agg_avg_4251992913115478"
FROM
    "items_tbl" as "items"
GROUP BY
    1),
cheerful as (
SELECT
    "items"."category" as "category",
    "sales"."id" as "sale_id",
    "sales"."item_price" as "sale_item_price"
FROM
    "items_tbl" as "items"
    INNER JOIN "sales_tbl" as "sales" on "items"."id" = "sales"."item_id"
WHERE
    "sales"."year" = 2023

GROUP BY
    1,
    2,
    3),
thoughtful as (
SELECT
    "cheerful"."sale_id" as "sale_id"
FROM
    "cheerful"
    INNER JOIN "highfalutin" on "cheerful"."category" = "highfalutin"."category"
WHERE
    "cheerful"."sale_item_price" > "highfalutin"."_virt_agg_avg_4251992913115478"

GROUP BY
    1)
SELECT
    count("thoughtful"."sale_id") as "sale_count"
FROM
    "thoughtful"

WITH 
highfalutin as (
SELECT
    "items"."category" as "category",
    avg("items"."price") as "_virt_agg_avg_4251992913115478"
FROM
    "items_tbl" as "items"
GROUP BY
    1),
cheerful as (
SELECT
    "items"."category" as "category",
    "sales"."id" as "sale_id",
    "sales"."item_price" as "sale_item_price"
FROM
    "items_tbl" as "items"
    INNER JOIN "sales_tbl" as "sales" on "items"."id" = "sales"."item_id"
WHERE
    "sales"."year" = 2023

GROUP BY
    1,
    2,
    3),
thoughtful as (
SELECT
    "cheerful"."sale_id" as "sale_id"
FROM
    "cheerful"
    INNER JOIN "highfalutin" on "cheerful"."category" = "highfalutin"."category"
WHERE
    "cheerful"."sale_item_price" > "highfalutin"."_virt_agg_avg_4251992913115478"

GROUP BY
    1)
SELECT
    count("thoughtful"."sale_id") as "sale_count"
FROM
    "thoughtful"

WITH 
quizzical as (
SELECT
    "order_products"."order_id" as "order_id",
    "order_products"."qty" as "qty"
FROM
    (
select 1 order_id, 1 product_id, 1 qty
union all
select 1, 2 ,1
union all
select 2, 2, 2
union all
select 3, 1, 2
union all
select 4, 2, 1
) as "order_products"),
highfalutin as (
SELECT
    "orders"."order_id" as "order_id",
    "orders"."store_id" as "stores_id"
FROM
    (
select 1 order_id, 1 store_id, 1 product_id, DATETIME  '1992-09-20 11:30:00.123456789' order_timestamp
union all
select 2, 1, 2, DATETIME   '1992-09-20 11:30:00.123456789'
union all
select 3, 2, 1, DATETIME   '1992-09-20 11:30:00.123456789'
union all
select 4, 2, 2, DATETIME   '1992-09-20 11:30:00.123456789'
union all
select 5, 3, 2, DATETIME   '1992-09-20 11:30:00.123456789'
) as "orders"),
wakeful as (
SELECT
    "stores_stores"."store_id" as "stores_id",
    "stores_stores"."store_name" as "stores_name"
FROM
    (
select 1 store_id, 'store1' store_name
union all
select 2, 'aspen'
union all
select 3, 'aspen'
) as "stores_stores")
SELECT
    sum("quizzical"."qty") as "total_qty_stores",
    "wakeful"."stores_name" as "stores_name"
FROM
    "wakeful"
    INNER JOIN "highfalutin" on "wakeful"."stores_id" = "highfalutin"."stores_id"
    INNER JOIN "quizzical" on "highfalutin"."order_id" = "quizzical"."order_id"
GROUP BY
    1,
    2
ORDER BY 
    "total_qty_stores" desc

  1. collapse_single_parent
  2. merge_irrelevant_group_by

  7. upgrade_join_on_guards.base_join_only after=['predicate_pushdown.initial'] (makes guarded dim BaseJoins INNER before union dim pushdown tries to match them)

  9. predicate_pushdown.after_union_dim after=['union_dim_pushdown'] refires_after=['union_dim_pushdown'] (only refires when union_dim_pushdown adds branch-visible dim concepts)
  10. predicate_pushdown.remove after=['predicate_pushdown.after_union_dim']
  11. merge_irrelevant_group_by.after_predicate_remove after=['predicate_pushdown.remove'] refires_after=['predicate_pushdown.remove'] (uses redundant predicates removed from grouped children)
  12. upgrade_join_on_guards.final after=['predicate_pushdown.remove'] (uses guards moved onto joining CTEs by predicate pushdown)
  13. predicate_pushdown.after_final_upgrade after=['upgrade_join_on_guards.final'] refires_after=['upgrade_join_on_guards.final'] (HAVING-into-group push is blocked while a consumer outer-joins the group (nullable parent); rerun once the final pass has upgraded CTE-to-CTE outer joins to INNER so the relocation can fire)
  14. upgrade_outer_key_set_equivalence after=['upgrade_join_on_guards.final'] (needs upstream filters in their final position so the accumulated-filter signatures on each side are stable)
  15. simplify_null_safe_joins after=['upgrade_join_on_guards.final', 'upgrade_outer_key_set_equivalence'] (join types and CTE nullability are settled, so redundant null-safe join keys can be downgraded to =)
  16. hide_unused_concepts

WITH 
cheerful as (
SELECT
    "game_events"."game_id" as "game_id",
    "game_events"."player_full_name" as "player_full_name"
FROM
    "bigquery-public-data"."ncaa_basketball"."mbb_pbp_sr" as "game_events"
GROUP BY
    1,
    2),
questionable as (
SELECT
    "game_events"."player_full_name" as "player_full_name",
    sum("game_events"."points_scored") as "_virt_agg_sum_2295964629883628"
FROM
    "bigquery-public-data"."ncaa_basketball"."mbb_pbp_sr" as "game_events"
GROUP BY
    1),
highfalutin as (
SELECT
    "game_events"."shot_subtype" as "shot_subtype",
    CASE
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'threepointmade' THEN (coalesce("game_events"."shot_type",'unspecified') || '-three')
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'twopointmade' THEN (coalesce("game_events"."shot_type",'unspecified') || '-two')
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'threepointmiss' THEN (coalesce("game_events"."shot_type",'unspecified') || '-three')
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'twopointmiss' THEN (coalesce("game_events"."shot_type",'unspecified') || '-two')
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'freethrowmade' THEN 'free-throw'
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'freethrowmiss' THEN 'free-throw'
	END as "shot_display",
    CASE WHEN CASE
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'threepointmade' THEN (coalesce("game_events"."shot_type",'unspecified') || '-three')
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'twopointmade' THEN (coalesce("game_events"."shot_type",'unspecified') || '-two')
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'threepointmiss' THEN (coalesce("game_events"."shot_type",'unspecified') || '-three')
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'twopointmiss' THEN (coalesce("game_events"."shot_type",'unspecified') || '-two')
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'freethrowmade' THEN 'free-throw'
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'freethrowmiss' THEN 'free-throw'
	END is not null THEN "game_events"."event_id" ELSE NULL END as "_virt_filter_id_7793451150397610",
    CASE WHEN CASE
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'threepointmade' THEN (coalesce("game_events"."shot_type",'unspecified') || '-three')
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'twopointmade' THEN (coalesce("game_events"."shot_type",'unspecified') || '-two')
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'threepointmiss' THEN (coalesce("game_events"."shot_type",'unspecified') || '-three')
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'twopointmiss' THEN (coalesce("game_events"."shot_type",'unspecified') || '-two')
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'freethrowmade' THEN 'free-throw'
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'freethrowmiss' THEN 'free-throw'
	END is not null and "game_events"."shot_made" THEN "game_events"."event_id" ELSE NULL END as "_virt_filter_id_4692010187413142"
FROM
    "bigquery-public-data"."ncaa_basketball"."mbb_pbp_sr" as "game_events"),
thoughtful as (
SELECT
    "cheerful"."player_full_name" as "player_full_name",
    count("cheerful"."game_id") as "_virt_agg_count_6314412377293846"
FROM
    "cheerful"
GROUP BY
    1),
cooperative as (
SELECT
    "thoughtful"."_virt_agg_count_6314412377293846" as "_virt_agg_count_6314412377293846",
    "thoughtful"."player_full_name" as "player_full_name",
    CASE
	WHEN "thoughtful"."_virt_agg_count_6314412377293846" > 10 THEN 1
	ELSE 0
	END as "eligible"
FROM
    "thoughtful"),
abundant as (
SELECT
    rank() over (order by "cooperative"."eligible" desc,"questionable"."_virt_agg_sum_2295964629883628" / "cooperative"."_virt_agg_count_6314412377293846" desc ) as "player_rank"
FROM
    "questionable"
    INNER JOIN "cooperative" on "questionable"."player_full_name" = "cooperative"."player_full_name"),
yummy as (
SELECT
    "abundant"."player_rank" as "player_rank",
    "highfalutin"."_virt_filter_id_4692010187413142" as "_virt_filter_id_4692010187413142",
    "highfalutin"."_virt_filter_id_7793451150397610" as "_virt_filter_id_7793451150397610",
    "highfalutin"."shot_display" as "shot_display",
    "highfalutin"."shot_subtype" as "shot_subtype"
FROM
    "highfalutin"
    FULL JOIN "abundant" on 1=1),
juicy as (
SELECT
    "yummy"."player_rank" as "player_rank",
    "yummy"."shot_display" as "shot_display",
    "yummy"."shot_subtype" as "shot_subtype",
    count("yummy"."_virt_filter_id_4692010187413142") as "shots_made",
    count("yummy"."_virt_filter_id_7793451150397610") as "shots_taken"
FROM
    "yummy"
GROUP BY
    1,
    2,
    3)
SELECT
    "juicy"."player_rank" as "player_rank",
    "juicy"."shot_display" as "shot_display",
    "juicy"."shot_subtype" as "shot_subtype",
    "juicy"."shots_taken" as "shots_taken",
    "juicy"."shots_made" as "shots_made",
    "juicy"."shots_taken" / "juicy"."shots_made" as "shooting_percentage"
FROM
    "juicy"
WHERE
    "juicy"."player_rank" = 1

ORDER BY 
    "juicy"."shots_taken" desc

WITH 
cheerful as (
SELECT
    "game_events"."game_id" as "game_id",
    "game_events"."player_full_name" as "player_full_name"
FROM
    "bigquery-public-data"."ncaa_basketball"."mbb_pbp_sr" as "game_events"
GROUP BY
    1,
    2),
questionable as (
SELECT
    "game_events"."player_full_name" as "player_full_name",
    sum("game_events"."points_scored") as "_virt_agg_sum_2295964629883628"
FROM
    "bigquery-public-data"."ncaa_basketball"."mbb_pbp_sr" as "game_events"
GROUP BY
    1),
highfalutin as (
SELECT
    "game_events"."shot_subtype" as "shot_subtype",
    CASE
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'threepointmade' THEN (coalesce("game_events"."shot_type",'unspecified') || '-three')
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'twopointmade' THEN (coalesce("game_events"."shot_type",'unspecified') || '-two')
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'threepointmiss' THEN (coalesce("game_events"."shot_type",'unspecified') || '-three')
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'twopointmiss' THEN (coalesce("game_events"."shot_type",'unspecified') || '-two')
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'freethrowmade' THEN 'free-throw'
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'freethrowmiss' THEN 'free-throw'
	END as "shot_display",
    CASE WHEN CASE
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'threepointmade' THEN (coalesce("game_events"."shot_type",'unspecified') || '-three')
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'twopointmade' THEN (coalesce("game_events"."shot_type",'unspecified') || '-two')
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'threepointmiss' THEN (coalesce("game_events"."shot_type",'unspecified') || '-three')
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'twopointmiss' THEN (coalesce("game_events"."shot_type",'unspecified') || '-two')
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'freethrowmade' THEN 'free-throw'
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'freethrowmiss' THEN 'free-throw'
	END is not null THEN "game_events"."event_id" ELSE NULL END as "_virt_filter_id_7793451150397610",
    CASE WHEN CASE
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'threepointmade' THEN (coalesce("game_events"."shot_type",'unspecified') || '-three')
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'twopointmade' THEN (coalesce("game_events"."shot_type",'unspecified') || '-two')
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'threepointmiss' THEN (coalesce("game_events"."shot_type",'unspecified') || '-three')
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'twopointmiss' THEN (coalesce("game_events"."shot_type",'unspecified') || '-two')
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'freethrowmade' THEN 'free-throw'
	WHEN "game_events"."event_type" = 'freethrowmiss' THEN 'free-throw'
	END is not null and "game_events"."shot_made" THEN "game_events"."event_id" ELSE NULL END as "_virt_filter_id_4692010187413142"
FROM
    "bigquery-public-data"."ncaa_basketball"."mbb_pbp_sr" as "game_events"),
thoughtful as (
SELECT
    "cheerful"."player_full_name" as "player_full_name",
    count("cheerful"."game_id") as "_virt_agg_count_6314412377293846"
FROM
    "cheerful"
GROUP BY
    1),
cooperative as (
SELECT
    "thoughtful"."_virt_agg_count_6314412377293846" as "_virt_agg_count_6314412377293846",
    "thoughtful"."player_full_name" as "player_full_name",
    CASE
	WHEN "thoughtful"."_virt_agg_count_6314412377293846" > 10 THEN 1
	ELSE 0
	END as "eligible"
FROM
    "thoughtful"),
abundant as (
SELECT
    rank() over (order by "cooperative"."eligible" desc,"questionable"."_virt_agg_sum_2295964629883628" / "cooperative"."_virt_agg_count_6314412377293846" desc ) as "player_rank"
FROM
    "questionable"
    INNER JOIN "cooperative" on "questionable"."player_full_name" = "cooperative"."player_full_name"),
yummy as (
SELECT
    "abundant"."player_rank" as "player_rank",
    "highfalutin"."_virt_filter_id_4692010187413142" as "_virt_filter_id_4692010187413142",
    "highfalutin"."_virt_filter_id_7793451150397610" as "_virt_filter_id_7793451150397610",
    "highfalutin"."shot_display" as "shot_display",
    "highfalutin"."shot_subtype" as "shot_subtype"
FROM
    "highfalutin"
    FULL JOIN "abundant" on 1=1),
juicy as (
SELECT
    "yummy"."player_rank" as "player_rank",
    "yummy"."shot_display" as "shot_display",
    "yummy"."shot_subtype" as "shot_subtype",
    count("yummy"."_virt_filter_id_4692010187413142") as "shots_made",
    count("yummy"."_virt_filter_id_7793451150397610") as "shots_taken"
FROM
    "yummy"
GROUP BY
    1,
    2,
    3)
SELECT
    "juicy"."player_rank" as "player_rank",
    "juicy"."shot_display" as "shot_display",
    "juicy"."shot_subtype" as "shot_subtype",
    "juicy"."shots_taken" as "shots_taken",
    "juicy"."shots_made" as "shots_made",
    "juicy"."shots_taken" / "juicy"."shots_made" as "shooting_percentage"
FROM
    "juicy"
WHERE
    "juicy"."player_rank" = 1

ORDER BY

[RENDERING] Compiled query: 
WITH 
quizzical as (
SELECT
    "rides"."end_station" as "end_station_id",
    "rides"."end_time" as "ride_end_time",
    "rides"."ride_id" as "ride_id",
    "rides"."start_station" as "start_station_id",
    "rides"."start_time" as "ride_start_time"
FROM
    (
select * from (
    values
      (1, '2025-01-01 08:00:00'::timestamp, '2025-01-01 08:15:00'::timestamp, 10, 20),
      (2, '2025-01-01 09:30:00'::timestamp, '2025-01-01 09:45:30'::timestamp, 11, 21),
      (3, '2025-01-02 12:00:00'::timestamp, '2025-01-02 12:05:00'::timestamp, 10, 22),
      (4, '2025-01-02 18:20:00'::timestamp, '2025-01-02 18:50:00'::timestamp, 12, 10),
      (5, '2025-01-03 07:05:00'::timestamp, '2025-01-03 07:25:00'::timestamp, 20, 11)
) as t(ride_id, start_time, end_time, start_station, end_station)
) as "rides"),
highfalutin as (
SELECT
    count("quizzical"."ride_id") as "daily_rides"
FROM
    "quizzical"
GROUP BY
    date_trunc('day', "quizzical"."ride_start_time")),
thoughtful as (
SELECT
    "quizzical"."start_station_id" as "start_station_id",
    avg("highfalutin"."daily_rides") as "_virt_agg_avg_7250811132665124"
FROM
    "highfalutin"
    FULL JOIN "quizzical" on 1=1
GROUP BY
    1),
questionable as (
SELECT
    "thoughtful"."start_station_id" as "start_station_id",
    rank() over (order by "thoughtful"."_virt_agg_avg_7250811132665124" desc ) as "daily_station_rank"
FROM
    "thoughtful"),
abundant as (
SELECT
    CASE WHEN "questionable"."daily_station_rank" <= 3 THEN "questionable"."start_station_id" ELSE NULL END as "_virt_filter_id_1758333771126850"
FROM
    "questionable")
SELECT
    "quizzical"."ride_id" as "ride_id",
    "quizzical"."start_station_id" as "start_station_id",
    "quizzical"."end_station_id" as "end_station_id",
    date_diff('second', "quizzical"."ride_start_time", "quizzical"."ride_end_time") as "ride_seconds"
FROM
    "quizzical"
WHERE
    "quizzical"."end_station_id" in (select abundant."_virt_filter_id_1758333771126850" from abundant where abundant."_virt_filter_id_1758333771126850" is not null)

ORDER BY 
    "quizzical"."ride_id" asc

WITH 
quizzical as (
SELECT
    "rides"."end_station" as "end_station_id",
    "rides"."end_time" as "ride_end_time",
    "rides"."ride_id" as "ride_id",
    "rides"."start_station" as "start_station_id",
    "rides"."start_time" as "ride_start_time"
FROM
    (
select * from (
    values
      (1, '2025-01-01 08:00:00'::timestamp, '2025-01-01 08:15:00'::timestamp, 10, 20),
      (2, '2025-01-01 09:30:00'::timestamp, '2025-01-01 09:45:30'::timestamp, 11, 21),
      (3, '2025-01-02 12:00:00'::timestamp, '2025-01-02 12:05:00'::timestamp, 10, 22),
      (4, '2025-01-02 18:20:00'::timestamp, '2025-01-02 18:50:00'::timestamp, 12, 10),
      (5, '2025-01-03 07:05:00'::timestamp, '2025-01-03 07:25:00'::timestamp, 20, 11)
) as t(ride_id, start_time, end_time, start_station, end_station)
) as "rides"),
highfalutin as (
SELECT
    count("quizzical"."ride_id") as "daily_rides"
FROM
    "quizzical"
GROUP BY
    date_trunc('day', "quizzical"."ride_start_time")),
thoughtful as (
SELECT
    "quizzical"."start_station_id" as "start_station_id",
    avg("highfalutin"."daily_rides") as "_virt_agg_avg_7250811132665124"
FROM
    "highfalutin"
    FULL JOIN "quizzical" on 1=1
GROUP BY
    1),
questionable as (
SELECT
    "thoughtful"."start_station_id" as "start_station_id",
    rank() over (order by "thoughtful"."_virt_agg_avg_7250811132665124" desc ) as "daily_station_rank"
FROM
    "thoughtful"),
abundant as (
SELECT
    CASE WHEN "questionable"."daily_station_rank" <= 3 THEN "questionable"."start_station_id" ELSE NULL END as "_virt_filter_id_1758333771126850"
FROM
    "questionable")
SELECT
    "quizzical"."ride_id" as "ride_id",
    "quizzical"."start_station_id" as "start_station_id",
    "quizzical"."end_station_id" as "end_station_id",
    date_diff('second', "quizzical"."ride_start_time", "quizzical"."ride_end_time") as "ride_seconds"
FROM
    "quizzical"
WHERE
    "quizzical"."end_station_id" in (select abundant."_virt_filter_id_1758333771126850" from abundant where abundant."_virt_filter_id_1758333771126850" is not null)

ORDER BY 
    "quizzical"."ride_id" asc

[RENDERING] Compiled query: 
WITH 
cheerful as (
SELECT
    "holdings_symbol_cities"."city_name" as "symbol_city",
    "holdings_symbol_cities"."country_name" as "symbol_country",
    "holdings_symbol_cities"."latitude" as "symbol_latitude",
    "holdings_symbol_cities"."longitude" as "symbol_longitude",
    "holdings_symbol_symbol_data"."id" as "symbol_id",
    "holdings_ticker_holdings"."provider" as "provider_id",
    "holdings_ticker_holdings"."value" as "holdings_value",
    STRING_SPLIT( "holdings_symbol_cities"."state_iso_code" , '-' )[1] as "symbol_state"
FROM
    "data"."main"."ticker_holdings" as "holdings_ticker_holdings"
    INNER JOIN "symbols" as "holdings_symbol_symbol_data" on "holdings_ticker_holdings"."symbol" = "holdings_symbol_symbol_data"."id"
    INNER JOIN "cities" as "holdings_symbol_cities" on "holdings_symbol_symbol_data"."city" = "holdings_symbol_cities"."city_name" AND "holdings_symbol_symbol_data"."country" = "holdings_symbol_cities"."country_name" AND "holdings_symbol_symbol_data"."state" = STRING_SPLIT( "holdings_symbol_cities"."state_iso_code" , '-' )[1]),
questionable as (
SELECT
    "cheerful"."provider_id" as "provider_id",
    "cheerful"."symbol_city" as "symbol_city",
    "cheerful"."symbol_country" as "symbol_country",
    "cheerful"."symbol_state" as "symbol_state",
    sum("cheerful"."holdings_value") as "holding_value"
FROM
    "cheerful"
GROUP BY
    1,
    2,
    3,
    4,
    "cheerful"."symbol_latitude",
    "cheerful"."symbol_longitude"),
thoughtful as (
SELECT
    "cheerful"."provider_id" as "provider_id",
    "cheerful"."symbol_city" as "symbol_city",
    "cheerful"."symbol_country" as "symbol_country",
    "cheerful"."symbol_latitude" as "symbol_latitude",
    "cheerful"."symbol_longitude" as "symbol_longitude",
    "cheerful"."symbol_state" as "symbol_state",
    count("cheerful"."symbol_id") as "holding_count"
FROM
    "cheerful"
GROUP BY
    1,
    2,
    3,
    4,
    5,
    6),
abundant as (
SELECT
    "questionable"."holding_value" as "holding_value",
    "questionable"."provider_id" as "provider_id",
    "questionable"."symbol_city" as "symbol_city",
    "questionable"."symbol_country" as "symbol_country",
    "questionable"."symbol_state" as "symbol_state",
    CASE
	WHEN "questionable"."provider_id" = 1 THEN 'robinhood'
	WHEN "questionable"."provider_id" = 2 THEN 'alpaca'
	WHEN "questionable"."provider_id" = 3 THEN 'webull'
	WHEN "questionable"."provider_id" = 4 THEN 'schwab'
	WHEN "questionable"."provider_id" = 5 THEN 'moomoo'
	ELSE 'unknown'
	END as "provider_name"
FROM
    "questionable")
SELECT
    "abundant"."provider_name" as "provider_name",
    "thoughtful"."symbol_country" as "symbol_country",
    "thoughtful"."symbol_city" as "symbol_city",
    "thoughtful"."symbol_latitude" as "symbol_latitude",
    "thoughtful"."symbol_longitude" as "symbol_longitude",
    "thoughtful"."symbol_state" as "symbol_state",
    "abundant"."holding_value" as "holding_value",
    "thoughtful"."holding_count" as "holding_count"
FROM
    "abundant"
    INNER JOIN "thoughtful" on "abundant"."provider_id" = "thoughtful"."provider_id" AND "abundant"."symbol_city" = "thoughtful"."symbol_city" AND "abundant"."symbol_country" = "thoughtful"."symbol_country" AND "abundant"."symbol_state" = "thoughtful"."symbol_state"

  1. collapse_single_parent
  2. merge_irrelevant_group_by
  3. inline_datasource
  4. join_hoist after=['inline_datasource'] (runs after datasource inlining so joins that target folded datasources stay folded when hoisted)
  5. merge_irrelevant_group_by.after_join_hoist after=['join_hoist'] refires_after=['join_hoist'] (uses joins and predicates stripped by join hoist)
  6. predicate_pushdown.initial after=['inline_datasource', 'join_hoist'] (runs after datasource inlining and join hoist so filters on folded raw sources stay local instead of requiring BuildDatasource pushdown)
  7. upgrade_join_on_guards.base_join_only after=['predicate_pushdown.initial'] (makes guarded dim BaseJoins INNER before union dim pushdown tries to match them)
  8. union_dim_pushdown after=['predicate_pushdown.initial', 'upgrade_join_on_guards.base_join_only'] (matches settled consumer predicates and INNER dim joins)
  9. predicate_pushdown.after_union_dim after=['union_dim_pushdown'] refires_after=['union_dim_pushdown'] (only refires when union_dim_pushdown adds branch-visible dim concepts)
  10. predicate_pushdown.remove after=['predicate_pushdown.after_union_dim']
  11. merge_irrelevant_group_by.after_predicate_remove after=['predicate_pushdown.remove'] refires_after=['predicate_pushdown.remove'] (uses redundant predicates removed from grouped children)
  12. upgrade_join_on_guards.final after=['predicate_pushdown.remove'] (uses guards moved onto joining CTEs by predicate pushdown)
  13. predicate_pushdown.after_final_upgrade after=['upgrade_join_on_guards.final'] refires_after=['upgrade_join_on_guards.final'] (HAVING-into-group push is blocked while a consumer outer-joins the group (nullable parent); rerun once the final pass has upgraded CTE-to-CTE outer joins to INNER so the relocation can fire)
  14. upgrade_outer_key_set_equivalence after=['upgrade_join_on_guards.final'] (needs upstream filters in their final position so the accumulated-filter signatures on each side are stable)
  15. simplify_null_safe_joins after=['upgrade_join_on_guards.final', 'upgrade_outer_key_set_equivalence'] (join types and CTE nullability are settled, so redundant null-safe join keys can be downgraded to =)
  16. hide_unused_concepts

WITH 
cheerful as (
SELECT
    "holdings_symbol_cities"."city_name" as "symbol_city",
    "holdings_symbol_cities"."country_name" as "symbol_country",
    "holdings_symbol_cities"."latitude" as "symbol_latitude",
    "holdings_symbol_cities"."longitude" as "symbol_longitude",
    "holdings_symbol_symbol_data"."id" as "symbol_id",
    "holdings_ticker_holdings"."provider" as "provider_id",
    "holdings_ticker_holdings"."value" as "holdings_value",
    STRING_SPLIT( "holdings_symbol_cities"."state_iso_code" , '-' )[1] as "symbol_state"
FROM
    "data"."main"."ticker_holdings" as "holdings_ticker_holdings"
    INNER JOIN "symbols" as "holdings_symbol_symbol_data" on "holdings_ticker_holdings"."symbol" = "holdings_symbol_symbol_data"."id"
    INNER JOIN "cities" as "holdings_symbol_cities" on "holdings_symbol_symbol_data"."city" = "holdings_symbol_cities"."city_name" AND "holdings_symbol_symbol_data"."country" = "holdings_symbol_cities"."country_name" AND "holdings_symbol_symbol_data"."state" = STRING_SPLIT( "holdings_symbol_cities"."state_iso_code" , '-' )[1]),
questionable as (
SELECT
    "cheerful"."provider_id" as "provider_id",
    "cheerful"."symbol_city" as "symbol_city",
    "cheerful"."symbol_country" as "symbol_country",
    "cheerful"."symbol_state" as "symbol_state",
    sum("cheerful"."holdings_value") as "holding_value"
FROM
    "cheerful"
GROUP BY
    1,
    2,
    3,
    4,
    "cheerful"."symbol_latitude",
    "cheerful"."symbol_longitude"),
thoughtful as (
SELECT
    "cheerful"."provider_id" as "provider_id",
    "cheerful"."symbol_city" as "symbol_city",
    "cheerful"."symbol_country" as "symbol_country",
    "cheerful"."symbol_latitude" as "symbol_latitude",
    "cheerful"."symbol_longitude" as "symbol_longitude",
    "cheerful"."symbol_state" as "symbol_state",
    count("cheerful"."symbol_id") as "holding_count"
FROM
    "cheerful"
GROUP BY
    1,
    2,
    3,
    4,
    5,
    6),
abundant as (
SELECT
    "questionable"."holding_value" as "holding_value",
    "questionable"."provider_id" as "provider_id",
    "questionable"."symbol_city" as "symbol_city",
    "questionable"."symbol_country" as "symbol_country",
    "questionable"."symbol_state" as "symbol_state",
    CASE
	WHEN "questionable"."provider_id" = 1 THEN 'robinhood'
	WHEN "questionable"."provider_id" = 2 THEN 'alpaca'
	WHEN "questionable"."provider_id" = 3 THEN 'webull'
	WHEN "questionable"."provider_id" = 4 THEN 'schwab'
	WHEN "questionable"."provider_id" = 5 THEN 'moomoo'
	ELSE 'unknown'
	END as "provider_name"
FROM
    "questionable")
SELECT
    "abundant"."provider_name" as "provider_name",
    "thoughtful"."symbol_country" as "symbol_country",
    "thoughtful"."symbol_city" as "symbol_city",
    "thoughtful"."symbol_latitude" as "symbol_latitude",
    "thoughtful"."symbol_longitude" as "symbol_longitude",
    "thoughtful"."symbol_state" as "symbol_state",
    "abundant"."holding_value" as "holding_value",
    "thoughtful"."holding_count" as "holding_count"
FROM
    "abundant"
    INNER JOIN "thoughtful" on "abundant"."provider_id" = "thoughtful"."provider_id" AND "abundant"."symbol_city" = "thoughtful"."symbol_city" AND "abundant"."symbol_country" = "thoughtful"."symbol_country" AND "abundant"."symbol_state" = "thoughtful"."symbol_state"

    round(( "abundant"."monday_sales" ) / ("abundant"."_virt_window_lead_9809563217267406"),2) as "monday_increase",

    round(( "abundant"."wednesday_sales" ) / ("abundant"."_virt_window_lead_315641373767519"),2) as "wednesday_increase",

    round(( "abundant"."saturday_sales" ) / ("abundant"."_virt_window_lead_5767709179323528"),2) as "saturday_increase"

    "customers"."c_custkey" as "id",
    CASE WHEN "customers"."c_acctbal" > 0 and SUBSTRING("customers"."c_phone",1,2) in ('13','31','23','29','30','18','17') THEN "customers"."c_acctbal" ELSE NULL END as "avg_bal_in_target",
    SUBSTRING("customers"."c_phone",1,2) as "cntrycode"
FROM
    "memory"."customer" as "customers"),
cheerful as (
SELECT
    "customers"."c_custkey" as "id",
    count("orders_orders"."o_orderkey") as "order_count_per_customer"
FROM
    "memory"."customer" as "customers"
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "memory"."orders" as "orders_orders" on "customers"."c_custkey" = "orders_orders"."o_custkey"
WHERE
    SUBSTRING("customers"."c_phone",1,2) in ('13','31','23','29','30','18','17')

GROUP BY
    1,
    "customers"."c_acctbal"),
questionable as (
SELECT
    "highfalutin"."account_balance" as "account_balance",
    "highfalutin"."avg_bal_in_target" as "avg_bal_in_target",
    "highfalutin"."cntrycode" as "cntrycode",
    "highfalutin"."id" as "id",
    coalesce("cheerful"."order_count_per_customer",0) as "order_count_per_customer"
FROM
    "highfalutin"
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "cheerful" on "highfalutin"."id" = "cheerful"."id"),
juicy as (
SELECT
    "questionable"."cntrycode" as "cntrycode",
    sum("questionable"."account_balance") as "totacctbal"
FROM
    "questionable"
GROUP BY
    1),
abundant as (
SELECT
    "questionable"."cntrycode" as "cntrycode",
    count("questionable"."id") as "numcust"
FROM
    "questionable"
WHERE
    "questionable"."account_balance" > "questionable"."avg_bal_in_target" and coalesce("questionable"."order_count_per_customer",0) = 0

GROUP BY
    1)
SELECT
    "abundant"."cntrycode" as "cntrycode",
    "abundant"."numcust" as "numcust",
    "juicy"."totacctbal" as "totacctbal"
FROM
    "juicy"
    INNER JOIN "abundant" on "juicy"."cntrycode" = "abundant"."cntrycode"
ORDER BY 
    "abundant"."cntrycode" asc

WITH 
highfalutin as (
SELECT
    "customers"."c_acctbal" as "account_balance",
    "customers"."c_custkey" as "id",
    CASE WHEN "customers"."c_acctbal" > 0 and SUBSTRING("customers"."c_phone",1,2) in ('13','31','23','29','30','18','17') THEN "customers"."c_acctbal" ELSE NULL END as "avg_bal_in_target",
    SUBSTRING("customers"."c_phone",1,2) as "cntrycode"
FROM
    "memory"."customer" as "customers"),
cheerful as (
SELECT
    "customers"."c_custkey" as "id",
    count("orders_orders"."o_orderkey") as "order_count_per_customer"
FROM
    "memory"."customer" as "customers"
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "memory"."orders" as "orders_orders" on "customers"."c_custkey" = "orders_orders"."o_custkey"
WHERE
    SUBSTRING("customers"."c_phone",1,2) in ('13','31','23','29','30','18','17')

GROUP BY
    1,
    "customers"."c_acctbal"),
questionable as (
SELECT
    "highfalutin"."account_balance" as "account_balance",
    "highfalutin"."avg_bal_in_target" as "avg_bal_in_target",
    "highfalutin"."cntrycode" as "cntrycode",
    "highfalutin"."id" as "id",
    coalesce("cheerful"."order_count_per_customer",0) as "order_count_per_customer"
FROM
    "highfalutin"
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "cheerful" on "highfalutin"."id" = "cheerful"."id"),
juicy as (
SELECT
    "questionable"."cntrycode" as "cntrycode",
    sum("questionable"."account_balance") as "totacctbal"
FROM
    "questionable"
GROUP BY
    1),
abundant as (
SELECT
    "questionable"."cntrycode" as "cntrycode",
    count("questionable"."id") as "numcust"
FROM
    "questionable"
WHERE
    "questionable"."account_balance" > "questionable"."avg_bal_in_target" and coalesce("questionable"."order_count_per_customer",0) = 0

GROUP BY
    1)
SELECT
    "abundant"."cntrycode" as "cntrycode",
    "abundant"."numcust" as "numcust",
    "juicy"."totacctbal" as "totacctbal"
FROM
    "juicy"
    INNER JOIN "abundant" on "juicy"."cntrycode" = "abundant"."cntrycode"
ORDER BY 
    "abundant"."cntrycode" asc

[RENDERING] Compiled query: 
WITH 
highfalutin as (
SELECT
    "customers"."c_acctbal" as "account_balance",
    "customers"."c_custkey" as "id",
    CASE WHEN "customers"."c_acctbal" > 0 and SUBSTRING("customers"."c_phone",1,2) in ('13','31','23','29','30','18','17') THEN "customers"."c_acctbal" ELSE NULL END as "avg_bal_in_target",
    SUBSTRING("customers"."c_phone",1,2) as "cntrycode"
FROM
    "memory"."customer" as "customers"),
cheerful as (
SELECT
    "customers"."c_custkey" as "id",
    count("orders_orders"."o_orderkey") as "order_count_per_customer"
FROM
    "memory"."customer" as "customers"
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "memory"."orders" as "orders_orders" on "customers"."c_custkey" = "orders_orders"."o_custkey"
WHERE
    SUBSTRING("customers"."c_phone",1,2) in ('13','31','23','29','30','18','17')

GROUP BY
    1,
    "customers"."c_acctbal"),
questionable as (
SELECT
    "highfalutin"."account_balance" as "account_balance",
    "highfalutin"."avg_bal_in_target" as "avg_bal_in_target",
    "highfalutin"."cntrycode" as "cntrycode",
    "highfalutin"."id" as "id",
    coalesce("cheerful"."order_count_per_customer",0) as "order_count_per_customer"
FROM
    "highfalutin"
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "cheerful" on "highfalutin"."id" = "cheerful"."id"),
juicy as (
SELECT
    "questionable"."cntrycode" as "cntrycode",
    sum("questionable"."account_balance") as "totacctbal"
FROM
    "questionable"
GROUP BY
    1),
abundant as (
SELECT
    "questionable"."cntrycode" as "cntrycode",
    count("questionable"."id") as "numcust"
FROM
    "questionable"
WHERE
    "questionable"."account_balance" > "questionable"."avg_bal_in_target" and coalesce("questionable"."order_count_per_customer",0) = 0

GROUP BY
    1)
SELECT
    "abundant"."cntrycode" as "cntrycode",
    "abundant"."numcust" as "numcust",
    "juicy"."totacctbal" as "totacctbal"
FROM
    "juicy"
    INNER JOIN "abundant" on "juicy"."cntrycode" = "abundant"."cntrycode"
ORDER BY 
    "abundant"."cntrycode" asc

INFO     trilogy:base.py:2310 [RENDERING] Compiled query: 
WITH 
highfalutin as (
SELECT
    "customers"."c_acctbal" as "account_balance",
    "customers"."c_custkey" as "id",
    CASE WHEN "customers"."c_acctbal" > 0 and SUBSTRING("customers"."c_phone",1,2) in ('13','31','23','29','30','18','17') THEN "customers"."c_acctbal" ELSE NULL END as "avg_bal_in_target",
    SUBSTRING("customers"."c_phone",1,2) as "cntrycode"
FROM
    "memory"."customer" as "customers"),
cheerful as (
SELECT
    "customers"."c_custkey" as "id",
    count("orders_orders"."o_orderkey") as "order_count_per_customer"
FROM
    "memory"."customer" as "customers"
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "memory"."orders" as "orders_orders" on "customers"."c_custkey" = "orders_orders"."o_custkey"
WHERE
    SUBSTRING("customers"."c_phone",1,2) in ('13','31','23','29','30','18','17')

GROUP BY
    1,
    "customers"."c_acctbal"),
questionable as (
SELECT
    "highfalutin"."account_balance" as "account_balance",
    "highfalutin"."avg_bal_in_target" as "avg_bal_in_target",
    "highfalutin"."cntrycode" as "cntrycode",
    "highfalutin"."id" as "id",
    coalesce("cheerful"."order_count_per_customer",0) as "order_count_per_customer"
FROM
    "highfalutin"
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "cheerful" on "highfalutin"."id" = "cheerful"."id"),
juicy as (
SELECT
    "questionable"."cntrycode" as "cntrycode",
    sum("questionable"."account_balance") as "totacctbal"
FROM
    "questionable"
GROUP BY
    1),
abundant as (
SELECT
    "questionable"."cntrycode" as "cntrycode",
    count("questionable"."id") as "numcust"
FROM
    "questionable"
WHERE
    "questionable"."account_balance" > "questionable"."avg_bal_in_target" and coalesce("questionable"."order_count_per_customer",0) = 0

GROUP BY
    1)
SELECT
    "abundant"."cntrycode" as "cntrycode",
    "abundant"."numcust" as "numcust",
    "juicy"."totacctbal" as "totacctbal"
FROM
    "juicy"
    INNER JOIN "abundant" on "juicy"."cntrycode" = "abundant"."cntrycode"
ORDER BY 
    "abundant"."cntrycode" asc

INFO     trilogy:base.py:2310 [RENDERING] Compiled query: 
WITH 
highfalutin as (
SELECT
    "customers"."c_acctbal" as "account_balance",
    "customers"."c_custkey" as "id",
    CASE WHEN "customers"."c_acctbal" > 0 and SUBSTRING("customers"."c_phone",1,2) in ('13','31','23','29','30','18','17') THEN "customers"."c_acctbal" ELSE NULL END as "avg_bal_in_target",
    SUBSTRING("customers"."c_phone",1,2) as "cntrycode"
FROM
    "memory"."customer" as "customers"),
cheerful as (
SELECT
    "customers"."c_custkey" as "id",
    count("orders_orders"."o_orderkey") as "order_count_per_customer"
FROM
    "memory"."customer" as "customers"
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "memory"."orders" as "orders_orders" on "customers"."c_custkey" = "orders_orders"."o_custkey"
WHERE
    SUBSTRING("customers"."c_phone",1,2) in ('13','31','23','29','30','18','17')

GROUP BY
    1,
    "customers"."c_acctbal"),
questionable as (
SELECT
    "highfalutin"."account_balance" as "account_balance",
    "highfalutin"."avg_bal_in_target" as "avg_bal_in_target",
    "highfalutin"."cntrycode" as "cntrycode",
    "highfalutin"."id" as "id",
    coalesce("cheerful"."order_count_per_customer",0) as "order_count_per_customer"
FROM
    "highfalutin"
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "cheerful" on "highfalutin"."id" = "cheerful"."id"),
juicy as (
SELECT
    "questionable"."cntrycode" as "cntrycode",
    sum("questionable"."account_balance") as "totacctbal"
FROM
    "questionable"
GROUP BY
    1),
abundant as (
SELECT
    "questionable"."cntrycode" as "cntrycode",
    count("questionable"."id") as "numcust"
FROM
    "questionable"
WHERE
    "questionable"."account_balance" > "questionable"."avg_bal_in_target" and coalesce("questionable"."order_count_per_customer",0) = 0

GROUP BY
    1)
SELECT
    "abundant"."cntrycode" as "cntrycode",
    "abundant"."numcust" as "numcust",
    "juicy"."totacctbal" as "totacctbal"
FROM
    "juicy"
    INNER JOIN "abundant" on "juicy"."cntrycode" = "abundant"."cntrycode"
ORDER BY 
    "abundant"."cntrycode" asc

INFO     trilogy:base.py:2310 [RENDERING] Compiled query: 
WITH 
highfalutin as (
SELECT
    "customers"."c_acctbal" as "account_balance",
    "customers"."c_custkey" as "id",
    CASE WHEN "customers"."c_acctbal" > 0 and SUBSTRING("customers"."c_phone",1,2) in ('13','31','23','29','30','18','17') THEN "customers"."c_acctbal" ELSE NULL END as "avg_bal_in_target",
    SUBSTRING("customers"."c_phone",1,2) as "cntrycode"
FROM
    "memory"."customer" as "customers"),
cheerful as (
SELECT
    "customers"."c_custkey" as "id",
    count("orders_orders"."o_orderkey") as "order_count_per_customer"
FROM
    "memory"."customer" as "customers"
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "memory"."orders" as "orders_orders" on "customers"."c_custkey" = "orders_orders"."o_custkey"
WHERE
    SUBSTRING("customers"."c_phone",1,2) in ('13','31','23','29','30','18','17')

GROUP BY
    1,
    "customers"."c_acctbal"),
questionable as (
SELECT
    "highfalutin"."account_balance" as "account_balance",
    "highfalutin"."avg_bal_in_target" as "avg_bal_in_target",
    "highfalutin"."cntrycode" as "cntrycode",
    "highfalutin"."id" as "id",
    coalesce("cheerful"."order_count_per_customer",0) as "order_count_per_customer"
FROM
    "highfalutin"
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "cheerful" on "highfalutin"."id" = "cheerful"."id"),
juicy as (
SELECT
    "questionable"."cntrycode" as "cntrycode",
    sum("questionable"."account_balance") as "totacctbal"
FROM
    "questionable"
GROUP BY
    1),
abundant as (
SELECT
    "questionable"."cntrycode" as "cntrycode",
    count("questionable"."id") as "numcust"
FROM
    "questionable"
WHERE
    "questionable"."account_balance" > "questionable"."avg_bal_in_target" and coalesce("questionable"."order_count_per_customer",0) = 0

GROUP BY
    1)
SELECT
    "abundant"."cntrycode" as "cntrycode",
    "abundant"."numcust" as "numcust",
    "juicy"."totacctbal" as "totacctbal"
FROM
    "juicy"
    INNER JOIN "abundant" on "juicy"."cntrycode" = "abundant"."cntrycode"
ORDER BY 
    "abundant"."cntrycode" asc

INFO     trilogy:base.py:2310 [RENDERING] Compiled query: 
WITH 
highfalutin as (
SELECT
    "customers"."c_acctbal" as "account_balance",
    "customers"."c_custkey" as "id",
    CASE WHEN "customers"."c_acctbal" > 0 and SUBSTRING("customers"."c_phone",1,2) in ('13','31','23','29','30','18','17') THEN "customers"."c_acctbal" ELSE NULL END as "avg_bal_in_target",
    SUBSTRING("customers"."c_phone",1,2) as "cntrycode"
FROM
    "memory"."customer" as "customers"),
cheerful as (
SELECT
    "customers"."c_custkey" as "id",
    count("orders_orders"."o_orderkey") as "order_count_per_customer"
FROM
    "memory"."customer" as "customers"
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "memory"."orders" as "orders_orders" on "customers"."c_custkey" = "orders_orders"."o_custkey"
WHERE
    SUBSTRING("customers"."c_phone",1,2) in ('13','31','23','29','30','18','17')

GROUP BY
    1,
    "customers"."c_acctbal"),
questionable as (
SELECT
    "highfalutin"."account_balance" as "account_balance",
    "highfalutin"."avg_bal_in_target" as "avg_bal_in_target",
    "highfalutin"."cntrycode" as "cntrycode",
    "highfalutin"."id" as "id",
    coalesce("cheerful"."order_count_per_customer",0) as "order_count_per_customer"
FROM
    "highfalutin"
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "cheerful" on "highfalutin"."id" = "cheerful"."id"),
juicy as (
SELECT
    "questionable"."cntrycode" as "cntrycode",
    sum("questionable"."account_balance") as "totacctbal"
FROM
    "questionable"
GROUP BY
    1),
abundant as (
SELECT
    "questionable"."cntrycode" as "cntrycode",
    count("questionable"."id") as "numcust"
FROM
    "questionable"
WHERE
    "questionable"."account_balance" > "questionable"."avg_bal_in_target" and coalesce("questionable"."order_count_per_customer",0) = 0

GROUP BY
    1)
SELECT
    "abundant"."cntrycode" as "cntrycode",
    "abundant"."numcust" as "numcust",
    "juicy"."totacctbal" as "totacctbal"
FROM
    "juicy"
    INNER JOIN "abundant" on "juicy"."cntrycode" = "abundant"."cntrycode"
ORDER BY 
    "abundant"."cntrycode" asc

  1. collapse_single_parent
  2. merge_irrelevant_group_by
  3. inline_datasource
  4. join_hoist after=['inline_datasource'] (runs after datasource inlining so joins that target folded datasources stay folded when hoisted)
  5. merge_irrelevant_group_by.after_join_hoist after=['join_hoist'] refires_after=['join_hoist'] (uses joins and predicates stripped by join hoist)
  6. predicate_pushdown.initial after=['inline_datasource', 'join_hoist'] (runs after datasource inlining and join hoist so filters on folded raw sources stay local instead of requiring BuildDatasource pushdown)
  7. upgrade_join_on_guards.base_join_only after=['predicate_pushdown.initial'] (makes guarded dim BaseJoins INNER before union dim pushdown tries to match them)
  8. union_dim_pushdown after=['predicate_pushdown.initial', 'upgrade_join_on_guards.base_join_only'] (matches settled consumer predicates and INNER dim joins)
  9. predicate_pushdown.after_union_dim after=['union_dim_pushdown'] refires_after=['union_dim_pushdown'] (only refires when union_dim_pushdown adds branch-visible dim concepts)
  10. predicate_pushdown.remove after=['predicate_pushdown.after_union_dim']
  11. merge_irrelevant_group_by.after_predicate_remove after=['predicate_pushdown.remove'] refires_after=['predicate_pushdown.remove'] (uses redundant predicates removed from grouped children)
  12. upgrade_join_on_guards.final after=['predicate_pushdown.remove'] (uses guards moved onto joining CTEs by predicate pushdown)
  13. predicate_pushdown.after_final_upgrade after=['upgrade_join_on_guards.final'] refires_after=['upgrade_join_on_guards.final'] (HAVING-into-group push is blocked while a consumer outer-joins the group (nullable parent); rerun once the final pass has upgraded CTE-to-CTE outer joins to INNER so the relocation can fire)
  14. upgrade_outer_key_set_equivalence after=['upgrade_join_on_guards.final'] (needs upstream filters in their final position so the accumulated-filter signatures on each side are stable)
  15. simplify_null_safe_joins after=['upgrade_join_on_guards.final', 'upgrade_outer_key_set_equivalence'] (join types and CTE nullability are settled, so redundant null-safe join keys can be downgraded to =)
  16. hide_unused_concepts
